home.title: Cherry Production
home.aboutText1: Cherry Production, fueled by love, amateur arrangement and transcription.
home.aboutText2: Adapt favorite K-pop songs; submissions and recommendations are welcome.

features.preserve: Preserving the original style to the fullest

detail.otherFormat: If you prefer other format, please contact CherryProduction at Bilibili or Email.

intro.title: Introduction
intro.content: Cherry Production respects your privacy. This Privacy Statement explains what basic access data Cherry Production collect when you visit our website and how Cherry Production use it.

dataCollected.title: Basic Access Data Cherry Production Collect
dataCollected.description: Like most websites, Cherry Production automatically collect the following basic technical data for operational and analytical purposes:
dataCollected.referrerDesc: Which website you came from (if any)
dataCollected.durationDesc: How long the server took to respond
dataCollected.ipDesc: Rough geographic location and unique visitor count

purpose.title: How Cherry Production Use This Data
purpose.content: Cherry Production use this data solely to understand website traffic, monitor performance, identify slow responses, and improve user experience. Cherry Production do not attempt to identify individual visitors.

retention.title: Data Retention
retention.content: Basic access logs are kept for up to 30 days for security and troubleshooting purposes, then automatically deleted.

sharing.title: Data Sharing
sharing.content: Cherry Production do not sell, trade, or transfer your data to third parties. Aggregated statistics (e.g., total page views) may be shared internally, but no personal data is included.

rights.title: Your Rights
rights.content: Since Cherry Production do not collect personally identifiable information, there is no personal data to access or delete. If you have concerns, you may contact Cherry Production using the email below.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.content: If you have any questions about this Privacy Statement, please contact Cherry Production at: @qq.com
